## Research & Product

- Participating in research on AI Agents, AI for Science, and digital humanities, focusing on AI applications in knowledge organization, research practice, and education.
- Product Operations Intern at [codeebot](https://codeebots.com/) from 2026.02 to present, working on community product definition, MVP design, AI education partnerships, and offline event operations.
- Industry Research Intern at MiraclePlus, working with the mapping and latent space groups and focusing on frontier areas such as large AI models, on-device intelligence, and world models.
- Organized Wuhan University鈥檚 鈥淰olcano Cup鈥� AI Agent Innovation Competition and built an AI Agent training knowledge base for 1,000+ students and 370+ teams.

tool_input.old_string:
- **AI Agents and AI literacy education**: building low-barrier learning and practice systems for users from non-CS backgrounds.
- **Yubing ecosystem building**: building an infrastructure platform for AI literacy, youth science-and-technology education, and innovation practice.
- **AI + hardware + companionship**: exploring products that combine AI, physical devices, long-term companionship, emotional interaction, and youth development scenarios.
- **Digital humanities and knowledge graph visualization**: using NLP, knowledge graphs, and visualization to make classical texts and complex knowledge easier to understand.
- **Entrepreneurship communities**: connecting universities, developers, founders, companies, and public-interest organizations to help AI projects move from ideas to real-world implementation.

tool_input.content:
# Chang Liu | 鍒樼晠 鈥� Personal Homepage

This repository hosts the source code for my personal homepage, built with Jekyll and deployed with GitHub Pages.

杩欐槸鎴戠殑缁煎悎涓�浜轰富椤垫簮鐮佷粨搴擄紝鍩轰簬 Jekyll 鏋勫缓锛屽苟璁″垝閫氳繃 GitHub Pages 閮ㄧ讲銆俓n
## Site Structure / 缃戠珯缁撴瀯

- `_config.yml` 鈥� site-wide settings and author profile / 鍏ㄧ珯閰嶇疆涓庝綔鑰呬俊鎭痋n- `_pages/about.md` 鈥� homepage content with bilingual language switching / 甯︿腑鑻辨枃鍒囨崲鐨勯�栭〉姝ｆ枃
- `_data/navigation.yml` 鈥� top navigation / 椤堕儴瀵艰埅
- `_includes/` 鈥� shared layout snippets, including sidebar and header / 鍏变韩甯冨眬鐗囨�碉紝鍖呮嫭渚ц竟鏍忓拰椤靛ご
- `_sass/` 鈥� site styling / 缃戠珯鏍峰紡
- `assets/` 鈥� JavaScript and compiled CSS entry files / JavaScript 涓� CSS 鍏ュ彛鏂囦欢
- `images/` 鈥� avatar, favicon, and project images / 澶村儚銆佺綉绔欏浘鏍囧拰椤圭洰鍥剧墖
- `files/` 鈥� public downloadable files such as CV / 鍙�鍏�寮�涓嬭浇鐨勬枃浠讹紝渚嬪�傜畝鍘哱n
## Private Materials / 绉佹湁鏉愭枡

The local `Reference/` directory contains private resume and experience source files used only for drafting content. It is ignored by Git and should not be committed or uploaded.

鏈�鍦� `Reference/` 鐩�褰曞寘鍚�鐢ㄤ簬鏁寸悊涓婚〉鍐呭�圭殑涓�浜虹畝鍘嗗拰缁忓巻鏉愭枡锛屼粎渚涙湰鍦板弬鑰冦�傝�ョ洰褰曞凡鍔犲叆 `.gitignore`锛屼笉搴旀彁浜ゆ垨涓婁紶鍒� GitHub銆俓n
Runtime logs under `logs/` and generated Jekyll output under `_site/` are also ignored.

`logs/` 涓嬬殑杩愯�屾棩蹇楀拰 `_site/` 涓嬬殑 Jekyll 鏋勫缓浜х墿涔熶笉浼氭彁浜ゃ�俓n
## Local Preview / 鏈�鍦伴�勮�圽n
This project currently uses Ruby 3.1 from `D:\Ruby31-x64` on Windows because the GitHub Pages dependency set is older.

褰撳墠 Windows 鏈�鍦扮幆澧冧娇鐢� `D:\Ruby31-x64` 涓嬬殑 Ruby 3.1锛屽洜涓� GitHub Pages 渚濊禆鐗堟湰杈冩棫銆俓n
Run:

```powershell
$env:Path = "D:\Ruby31-x64\bin;$env:Path"
bundle _2.2.19_ install
bundle _2.2.19_ exec jekyll serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4000 --livereload
```

Open:

```text
http://127.0.0.1:4000
```

If `_config.yml` changes, restart the Jekyll server. Browser refresh alone is not enough for config changes.

濡傛灉淇�鏀逛簡 `_config.yml`锛岄渶瑕侀噸鍚� Jekyll 鏈嶅姟锛涘彧鍒锋柊娴忚�堝櫒涓嶄細閲嶆柊鍔犺浇閰嶇疆銆俓n
## Deployment / 閮ㄧ讲

For the user homepage repository `ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io`, push this repository to GitHub and enable GitHub Pages from the `main` branch, root folder.

瀵逛簬鐢ㄦ埛涓婚〉浠撳簱 `ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io`锛屾帹閫佸埌 GitHub 鍚庯紝鍦ㄤ粨搴撹�剧疆涓�鍚�鐢ㄤ粠 `main` 鍒嗘敮鏍圭洰褰曢儴缃� GitHub Pages銆俓n
Recommended pre-commit check:

```powershell
git status --short
```

Make sure `Reference/`, `logs/`, and `_site/` are not staged.

鎻愪氦鍓嶈�风‘璁� `Reference/`銆乣logs/` 鍜� `_site/` 娌℃湁琚�鏆傚瓨銆俓n
## Credits / 鑷磋阿
